What We Do

EIGHT SERVICE LINES.
ONE SHOP.

From precision CNC milling to field-deployed line boring to compact equipment repair — Axiom handles work that most shops have to turn away or send out. Every service line runs through the same documented quality system.

CNC Machining
Axiom CNC Vertical Machining Center with high-speed spindle and precision tool and part probing. Precision milled parts in aluminum, steel, stainless, and plastics. Reverse-engineered and digitized parts from worn or obsolete originals, plus one-off prototypes for testing and fit. Every part dimensionally verified and documented.
Manual Machining
Custom parts, repair components, fixtures, and one-off work that CNC setup time cannot justify. Hands-on manual milling and turning for jobs that need a machinist's judgment as much as a program — odd geometries, obsolete parts, and field-measured fits where no two jobs are quite the same.
Engine Repair & Rebuild
In-shop engine repair, top-end service, and complete rebuilds on gasoline and diesel engines. Every teardown measurement recorded. Every torque value logged. You receive a complete rebuild traveler — your maintenance record.
Hydraulic Repair
Cylinders, pumps, motors, valves, manifolds, and hydraulic power units. Bore measurement, honing, OEM seal kit installation, and pressure testing to rated working pressure. Bore measurements and pressure test results documented on every job.
Portable Line Boring
We come to your equipment. Pin bore restoration on excavators, dozers, loaders, agricultural equipment, trucks, and industrial machinery — at your job site. Pre and post bore measurements documented. Customer sign-off on site.
Welding & Fabrication
MIG, TIG, and Stick welding. Structural fabrication, repair welding, equipment modification, and cast iron repair. Visual inspection to AWS D1.1 criteria on every structural weld.
Powersports Repair
ATVs, UTVs, dirt bikes, motorcycles, personal watercraft, and snowmobiles. All makes and models. Diagnosis-first approach — we tell you what is wrong and what it will cost before we start.
Compact & Utility Equipment Repair
Skid steers, mini excavators, telehandlers, ATVs, UTVs, and small tractors. All makes and models. Diagnosis-first approach — we tell you what is wrong and what it will cost before we start.
Who We Are

BUILT FROM THE
SHOP FLOOR UP.

Axiom Machine Fab and Repair LLC is owned and operated by Tippa "Heath" Blanchard — a 35-year heavy equipment and rotating machinery industry veteran who built his career from entry-level mechanic to senior industry professional through years of demonstrated competence. That path taught lessons about accountability, documentation, and operational discipline that cannot be learned any other way.

Axiom brings that discipline to the shop floor. Every job runs through a documented quality management system aligned to ISO 9001:2015. You receive paperwork — measurements, torques, test results, and sign-offs — because your equipment and your maintenance records deserve documentation, not just a repair.

Quality System

The Difference

WHY AXIOM.

Most shops hand you back your equipment and say it is running. Axiom hands you back your equipment, tells you exactly what was done, and gives you the paperwork to prove it.

01
Documented Work
Every significant job produces a completed record — bore measurements, torque values, seal kit part numbers, pressure test results. That paperwork goes in your equipment file, not a trash can.
02
We Come to You
Portable line boring means your down excavator or damaged equipment does not have to move. Axiom shows up at your job site with the equipment and the expertise to restore it where it sits.
03
Eight Lines, One Shop
CNC milling, engine repair and rebuild, hydraulic repair, line boring, welding, fabrication, powersports, and compact equipment — work that most shops have to turn away or send out, Axiom handles in-house.
04
Quality System
An ISO 9001:2015 aligned quality management system governs every service line. Not because an auditor is coming — because that discipline produces better work every single time.
05
The Job Isn't Done Until It Runs
Shop repairs don't end at the door. When you install a rebuilt engine, repaired hydraulic, or overhauled component — Axiom comes to you for startup and run-in. On-site commissioning is priced into the job upfront, so there are no surprises and no guessing whether the repair actually held.
06
Straight Talk
If a repair costs more than the equipment is worth — we tell you before we start. If something unexpected is found during teardown — we stop, call you, and get approval before going further.
07
Boutique Shop, Real Expertise
Axiom is deliberately small — one person accountable from first call to final measurement. That lean operation means lower overhead, and lower overhead means competitive pricing on the short runs, odd jobs, and legacy equipment that larger shops won't touch without a minimum quantity or a premium upcharge.
Where We Work

SOUTHEAST LOUISIANA
AND BEYOND.

Shop-based services are available to customers throughout Southeast Louisiana. Portable line boring and field repair services travel to your equipment — wherever it sits.

Shop Services
Available to All Customers
CNC machining, manual machining, engine repair and rebuild, hydraulic repair, welding and fabrication, powersports repair, and compact and utility equipment repair are performed at the Axiom shop in Southeast Louisiana.
Field Service
Portable Line Boring — We Come to You
Standard field service radius is 200 miles from Southeast Louisiana. Extended service up to 500 miles is available by arrangement — when no local alternative exists and your equipment cannot move, Axiom will come to you. Mobilization quoted separately on every field job.
200 mi Standard 500 mi Extended
